$comment: Schema pin declaration for v2/baselines/** golden artifacts in tars. Phase 0 deliverable #5 of ga/docs/plans/2026-05-14-arch-cherny-adoption-and-tribunal-ci-plan-v2.md.

pins.qa_verdict_schema: ga/docs/contracts/qa-verdict.schema.json (tars consumes this when emitting tribunal verdicts)

policy.scope: Golden JSON artifacts produced AFTER this file's git introduction are pinned to these versions. Pre-existing goldens in v2/baselines/glm-4-9b-q4/ are implicitly draft/v0 — they may be re-baselined when WoT grammar evolves or model changes.
policy.bump_rule: On model version bump (e.g. glm-4-9b-q4 -> different quantization), add a new subdirectory under v2/baselines/ and update the models map above. Demerzel tribunal is informed via cross-repo dispatch.
